title: Gods Of Old: Rebirth Of The Cosmos
description:
For The 1st Minecraft Modjam (For The Discord Server I'm In)
Was Rushed Because I Was Really Busy, So It's Not My Finest Work.
Hopefully It's Good Enough Though.
It's A Fantasy Mod, that i made my own pantheon for.
body:
Just a fantasy mod i made for the first monthly modjam for a discord server i'm in. 
Made a custom pantheon for it, completely from scratch. 
Still a very heavy work in progress. 

Dependencies: 

Kleider's Custom Renderer:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kleiders-custom-renderer-api

Geckolib: (In Dependencies Tab)

Also, a lack of sanity due to the very w.i.p nature of this mod. 


Planned Features:

-Reworking And Retexturing Every Mob
-Adding More Structures
-Making/Commissioning Custom Models For Weapons/Mobs And Items. 

As well as a ton more for the future.

I hope you stick with me through this bumpy, all be it fun ride ahead!

Hope you enjoy my mod!
